candidate.completion: text me a typo so I can mistake it for chemistry.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please text me a typo so I can mistake it for chemistry.

evaluation.rationale: The line has a mildly fresh turn from loneliness to overreading contact as connection, but the typo-to-chemistry pivot feels more fanciful than logically inevitable. It carries some human truth, yet the phrasing is a bit stretched and not compressed or quotable enough to land as strong wit.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
